mapper.sql: select t5.setting_id,t5.price_id,t1.dept_id,t1.dept_name,t1.goods_id,t1.property_name,t1.quotation_id,t1.quotation_name,t1.spu_no,IFNULL(t5.price,t1.price) as price,t1.unit_id,t1.name as unit_name,t5.setting_date from (select t2.dept_id,t7.dept_name ,t2.quotation_name,t3.goods_id,t3.quotation_id,t3.property_name,t3.spu_no,t4.unit_id,t6.name, t4.price from store_goods_quotation t2 left join store_goods_quotation_goods t3 on t2.quotation_id=t3.quotation_id and t2.status=1 left join store_goods_quotation_unit_price t4 on t3.goods_id=t4.goods_id left join store_goods_sales_unit t6 on t4.unit_id=t6.unit_id left join sys_dept t7 on t7.dept_id=t2.dept_id) t1 left join store_price_setting_detail t5 on t1.goods_id=t5.goods_id

select t1.dept_id,t1.dept_name,t1.goods_id,t1.property_name,t1.quotation_id,t1.quotation_name,t1.spu_no,IFNULL(t5.price,t1.price) as price,t1.unit_id,t1.name as unit_name,t5.setting_date from (select t2.dept_id,t7.dept_name ,t2.quotation_name,t3.goods_id,t3.quotation_id,t3.property_name,t3.spu_no,t4.unit_id,t6.name, t4.price from store_goods_quotation t2 left join store_goods_quotation_goods t3 on t2.quotation_id=t3.quotation_id and t2.status=1 left join store_goods_quotation_unit_price t4 on t3.goods_id=t4.goods_id left join store_goods_sales_unit t6 on t4.unit_id=t6.unit_id left join sys_dept t7 on t7.dept_id=t2.dept_id) t1 left join store_price_setting_detail t5 on t1.goods_id=t5.goods_id and t5.status !=-1
mapper.select:
select spsd.setting_id, spsd.price_id, spsd.dept_id, sd.dept_name, spsd.goods_id, sgqg.property_name, sgq.quotation_id, sgq.quotation_name, sgqg.spu_no, spsd.price, spsd.unit_id, sgs.name as spu_name, sgsu.name as unit_name, sgqg.settlement_unit, if( spsd.unit_id=sgqg.unit_id or sgsuc.sub_case_main is null,1,sgsuc.sub_case_main) as sub_case_main, if( spsd.unit_id=sgqg.unit_id or sgsuc.sub_case_main is null,1,sgsuc.sub_case_main)*spsd.price as sell_price, spsd.setting_date from store_price_setting_detail spsd left join sys_dept sd on spsd.dept_id=sd.dept_id left join ( select t1.*,t2.settlement_unit ,t2.unit_id from store_goods_quotation_goods t1 left join store_goods_sales_unit t2 on t2.unit_id =t1.unit_ids ) as sgqg on sgqg.goods_id =spsd.goods_id left join store_goods_quotation sgq on sgq.quotation_id =sgqg.quotation_id left join store_goods_sales_unit sgsu on sgsu.unit_id =spsd.unit_id left join store_goods_spu_unit_conversion sgsuc on sgsuc.spu_no =spsd.spu_id and sgsuc.dept_id=spsd.dept_id left join store_goods_spu sgs on sgs.spu_no =spsd .spu_id where sgqg.status!=0 and sgq.status=1 and spsd.price_id = #{priceId} and sgs.name like CONCAT('%',#{spuName},'%') and sgq.quotation_name like CONCAT('%',#{quotationName},'%')
group by sgq.quotation_id
group by sgqg.spu_no
order by sgqg.spu_no desc
mapper.insert:
insert into store_price_setting_detail
price_id, spu_id, dept_id, unit_id, price, setting_date, status, create_time, last_modify_time,
#{priceId}, #{spuId}, #{deptId}, #{unitId}, #{price}, #{settingDate}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{lastModifyTime},

insert into store_price_setting_detail (price_id,spu_id,dept_id,unit_id ,price,setting_date,goods_id) select a.setting_id as price_id ,c.spu_no as spu_id,a.dept_id ,sgsu.main_unit_id as unit_id , ifnull( t5.price,c.price) as price ,a.opt_date as setting_date ,c.goods_id from store_price_setting a left join store_goods_quotation b on a.dept_id =b.dept_id left join store_goods_quotation_goods c on b.quotation_id=c.quotation_id left join store_goods_spu_unit sgsu on c.spu_no =sgsu.spu_no left join (select p2.price_id,p2.price,p2.goods_id from store_price_setting p1 left join store_price_setting_detail p2 on p1.setting_id =p2.price_id where p1.status='2') t5 on t5.price_id =a.setting_id and t5.goods_id=c.goods_id where a.opt_date =#{optDate} and c.spu_no is not null and c.status!=0 and b.status='1' and a.dept_id=#{deptId} and c.goods_id not in (select goods_id from store_price_setting_detail where setting_date =#{optDate} and dept_id =#{deptId})
mapper.update: update store_price_setting_detail set status = #{status} where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.delete:
delete from store_price_setting_detail where setting_id in
#{settingId}
